evals.prompt: I have this image https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517694712202-14dd9538aa97 — can you upload it to our media hosting?
evals.expected_output: Calls uploadImageToMinio with correct body.file_url parameter format
expectations: References the correct MCP tool name: mcp__mcpware-dev-tools__a-minio-uploadImageToMinio
Uses the correct parameter structure with body.file_url
Passes the exact URL provided by the user as file_url value

evals.prompt: I need a permanent link for this picture so I can use it in my bot config: https://cdn.example.com/banner.png
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as an upload request and calls uploadImageToMinio
expectations: References the correct MCP tool name: mcp__mcpware-dev-tools__a-minio-uploadImageToMinio
Uses the correct parameter structure with body.file_url
Passes the user's URL https://cdn.example.com/banner.png as file_url

evals.prompt: Upload these two images to hosting: https://example.com/logo.png and https://example.com/hero.jpg
evals.expected_output: Calls uploadImageToMinio twice, once per image, with correct parameters
expectations: References the correct MCP tool name: mcp__mcpware-dev-tools__a-minio-uploadImageToMinio
Calls or plans to call the tool twice — once for each image
Uses both URLs: https://example.com/logo.png and https://example.com/hero.jpg
